content.text: Shivaji was born in the hill-fort of Shivneri, near Junnar in Pune district. He was named after a local deity, the goddess Shivai.
Shivaji's mother Jijabai deeply influenced his life and upbringing, teaching him the stories of the Ramayana and Mahabharata.
He founded the Maratha Empire. His vision was to establish Hindavi Swarajya, a self-rule of Hindu people.

revision_note: doc_id corrected 2026-07-22: previously 'dharam_veer_shivaji', which never matched the app's actual figure_id ('chhatrapati-shivaji', from src/lib/data/dharm-veers/hindu.ts). This hero's AI reflection feature was unreachable in production prior to this fix. Content itself (source_name 'Shivaji The Great') was not re-verified in this batch and should be re-sourced to a named, rights-checked edition before being treated as fully policy-compliant.
